name: voyager-stack
description: Standard Voyager build environment: voyager-block-theme parent + core/blocks/orbit plugin suite. Run from a Voyager child-theme repo (e.g. va-exteriors) and wp-now mounts the cwd as the active theme. Run from any other dir and the preset scaffolds a fresh voyager-blank-child as the active theme.

plugins.note: CPTs, meta fields, taxonomies, feature toggles. Required by orbit + blocks.
Reusable block library. Now consolidated under VOYAGER_DEV_ROOT (was at F:/dev/voyager/voyager-blocks until 2026-05-07).
WP Abilities + MCP bridge + Portal sync. Pairs with voyager-core.

themes.note: Parent theme. Slug 'voyager'. Required by every Voyager child theme via Template: voyager.

If cwd has style.css with 'Template: voyager', mount cwd as active theme. Otherwise clone voyager-blank-child into ./voyager-child-scratch and mount that. Activate via: npx wp-now wp theme activate <slug>

source_resolution.default: Prefer ~/.voyager-dist/<component>/latest if present, fall back to $VOYAGER_DEV_ROOT/<component> working tree.
source_resolution.--use-dev: Force working trees, skip ~/.voyager-dist resolution. Use when actively editing core/blocks/orbit source.
source_resolution.sync: Run scripts/voyager-dist-sync.sh sync to populate ~/.voyager-dist/ from GitHub Releases.

post_start: wp plugin activate voyager-core voyager-blocks voyager-orbit

tier1_provision.note: After Tier 1 site data is added to Notion, run /provision-site-data <client> to push phone/email/address/hours/social URLs. Out of scope for local dev — only relevant on the SpinupWP dev/staging site.
